name: Buckwheat Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups water (can add a bit more if you prefer thinner cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all the dry ingredients until evenly blended.
2. Add the liquids to the dry ingredients and stir or shake as little as possible to create the batter. Small lumps are acceptable and will dissolve during cooking; however, overmixing can result in flat and heavy pancakes.
3. Spray a non-stick griddle with Pam for about half a second.
4. Wipe the surface with a folded paper towel after each use.
5. Cook the pancakes until they reach your desired thickness.
6. Yields approximately 12 medium-sized pancakes.
